title: Add ability to throw from a provider stub method
author: ryanmasondavies
body: This would enable creating stubs using a stub provider, for example to create commonly used fixtures.

title: Fails on property wrappers
author: ryanmasondavies
body:
This code does not work for properties annotated with property wrappers:

https://github.com/kateinoigakukun/StubKit/blob/33c9dfa6a049840dfd082f5ebbaf434e43df6549/Sources/StubKit/Injector.swift#L15-L26

I'm not sure what could be done about this, as the issue seems to be that MemoryLayout.offset doesn't work for property wrappers, but wanted to flag it for awareness.

title: Add ability to throw from a make constructor
author: ryanmasondavies
body: This would enable generating further stubs inside a make constructor.

title: Add key path subscript support
author: ryanmasondavies
body:
It would be great to be able to mutate a stub using key path subscripting.

At the moment mutation looks like this:

```
let post = try Stub.make(Post.self) {
	$0.set(\.id, value: 123)
}
```

With key path subscripting, it could look like this:

```
let post = try Stub.make(Post.self) {
	$0[\.id] = 123
}
```

I'm happy to propose this enhancement formally with a pull request, but is there any appetite for it before I do?
